heroImageAlt: People enjoying social wellbeing activities together at Dove Cottage
heroShortDescription: A varied range of activities arranged throughout the day, with the freedom to join as many or as few as you choose.
mainIntro1: A varied range of activities are arranged throughout the day and patients are welcome to get involved in as many or as few as they choose.
mainIntro2: We endeavour to offer a range of activities to meet different interests and welcome suggestions for new additions.
activitiesHeading: Some examples of our current activities include
facilitiesBody: Our purpose-built building offers large rooms where individuals can join together with others to enjoy activities and refreshments, as well as smaller, quieter and private spaces for reflection or relaxation if preferred.
referralIntro: To make a referral to our hospice please complete the
referralOutro: and someone will get in touch with you to discuss in more detail.
sideFormHint: Enquire about wellbeing activities or make a referral.
